common.tagline: Your bridge to settling in Ontario

landing.heading: Settle in Ontario with confidence
landing.subheading: Track your progress across 10 settlement pillars, discover trusted offers, and get guidance in English or Tagalog.
landing.eyebrow: Your bridge to life in Ontario
landing.heroTitle: Settle in Ontario, one step at a time.
landing.heroLede: Tulay guides newcomers through banking, housing, healthcare, jobs and more — with a clear checklist, trusted partners, and help in your language.
landing.trustNoSin: No status or SIN required to browse
landing.pillarsLede: From your first bank account to feeling at home in your community — Tulay covers the essentials Ontario newcomers face.
landing.trustFreeBody: Core checklist & guides cost you nothing, ever.
landing.trustLicensedBody: Regulated referrals go only to FSRA / provincially-licensed partners.
landing.trustTransparentBody: Every partner offer clearly labels if we may earn a referral fee.
landing.trustPrivateBody: You choose what to share. Nothing sold without your explicit consent.
landing.howTitleTl: Isang plano na angkop sa iyo.
landing.how1Body: Your status, city, language and top priorities — a 2-minute profile, no SIN needed.
landing.how2Body: Tulay orders the right tasks across all 10 pillars, so you always know what's next.
landing.how3Body: Compare clearly-labeled partner offers and ask our AI concierge anytime — in EN or TL.
landing.disclosure: Tulay earns referral fees from some partners when you choose their services. This never changes your price, and free guidance is always available without any offer.

onboarding.step1Title: When did you arrive in Canada?
onboarding.arrivalNote: This helps us show local services. We only store what you tell us, and never require your immigration status or SIN to use Tulay.
onboarding.step3TitleTl: Ikaw ang may kontrol sa iyong datos.
onboarding.consentCoreBody: We use your arrival status, city, language and priorities to create your checklist and show local services.
onboarding.consentCoreWho: Stored by Tulay only · Not shared
onboarding.consentReferralBody: When you choose to request an offer, we share only the details you enter in that form (e.g. name, email) with that specific partner.
onboarding.consentReferralWho: Shared per-offer, only with your action
onboarding.consentUpdatesBody: Optional email/notifications about your next steps and new services in your city.
onboarding.fineprint: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy. Tulay does not sell your personal information. Regulated referrals go only to licensed partners.

dashboard.loadError: We couldn't load your pillars. Please try again.

pillar.recommendedSub: Chosen for newcomers in Ontario. You're never obligated to pick one — the guides are always free.
pillar.noOffers: No offers are available for this pillar yet. Check back soon.
pillar.loadError: We couldn't load offers. Please try again.
pillar.selectPrompt: Select an offer to request it.

saved.title: Saved offers
saved.empty: You haven't saved anything yet. Save offers from any pillar to find them here.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.privacyBody: You can request a copy of your data or ask us to delete it at any time.
profile.deleteConfirmBody: This starts a deletion request. Your personal information will be removed; append-only compliance records are retained as required by law.

ambassadors.title: Become a Tulay Ambassador
ambassadors.lede: Help newcomers in your community settle with confidence — and earn a share of referral revenue when they use trusted partner services through your link.
ambassadors.how1: Share your unique referral link with newcomers you support.
ambassadors.how2: They get the same free guidance and clearly-labeled offers everyone does.
ambassadors.how3: When they use a partner offer through your link, you earn a transparent share.
ambassadors.yourLinkBody: Every ambassador gets a personal link like the one below. Share it anywhere.
